note.en: With this weapon, try to aim for some [[stat:cr]] stats to trigger the weapon passive reliably.

Although the [[stat:em|EM]] Main Stat isn't useful for [[character:yun-jin]] the passive decreases her [[stat:er]] requirements by a lot, especially at higher refinements. **It can reduce her [[stat:er]] requirements depending on refinement.** Note that **she must cast [[ability:burst]] first before [[ability:skill]], as the passive drains 3 energy initially when [[ability:skill||Skill]] is cast.** This weapon can be left at level 1 while still getting the full effect from the passive.
